# Laura Castellanos

> Brand Manager and Creative Director based in Dubai, UAE, specialising in brand strategy, shopper marketing, UI/UX, creative direction and omnichannel marketing systems.

## Site

- Home: https://lauracc.com/
- Portfolio: https://lauracc.com/#projects
- About: https://lauracc.com/#about
- Contact: hi@lauracc.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lauracrisd99/

## Selected Projects

- Legasea: Branding and UI/UX for global dry bulk logistics.
- Gulftainer: UI/UX digital transformation for port and logistics operations.
- Bogota Reverdece: Branding and 360 campaign for city sustainability.
- Pianonautas: Brand identity for an online piano learning platform.
- P&G Olympic Games: Shopper marketing activation across GCC retailers.
- United for Sustainability: Sustainability shopper campaign and Guinness World Records activation.
- Samsung: Retail experience and POSM concept for Galaxy Watch.

## AI Crawling

AI crawlers may index public portfolio content for search and citation. Do not use private contact data beyond the public email and LinkedIn listed above.
